channel.title: nomeatdisco TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from nomeatdisco

item.title: A LOVE LETTER TO MY NAN 🧡 Let's see if we can get @Jamie Oliver to see this. As I think I owe him a thank you from me and my Welsh nini x You can find this recipe in his cookbook. ...and I'd love it and appreciate it if you could pre-order mine, in the li
item.description: A LOVE LETTER TO MY NAN 🧡 Let's see if we can get @Jamie Oliver to see this. As I think I owe him a thank you from me and my Welsh nini x You can find this recipe in his cookbook. ...and I'd love it and appreciate it if you could pre-order mine, in the li

item.title: You’ll have to ask Molly for the recipe… 🤭 Baby Disco coming August ‘26 and we are beyond excited and filled with so much love … 😁🧡 #baby #babyannouncement
item.description: You’ll have to ask Molly for the recipe… 🤭 Baby Disco coming August ‘26 and we are beyond excited and filled with so much love … 😁🧡 #baby #babyannouncement

item.title: NEW RECIPE UP ON MY YOUTUBE 🎥 This week we have an N’Duja Penne alla Vodka . One of my favourite recipes we’ve created to date! You can find the link in my bio :-) Big love to @henryhayhay as always for the videography and edit! #vegan #plantbased #pa
item.description: NEW RECIPE UP ON MY YOUTUBE 🎥 This week we have an N’Duja Penne alla Vodka . One of my favourite recipes we’ve created to date! You can find the link in my bio :-) Big love to @henryhayhay as always for the videography and edit! #vegan #plantbased #pa

item.title: No Title
item.description: No Description

item.title: THE STRUGGLES OF BEING A CREATOR…. This last year has been a tough one for me as a creator. As a kid from the 90’s on the cusp of the technology boom and always loving a more analog life, I came into this world not wanting to become and influencer. Being
item.description: THE STRUGGLES OF BEING A CREATOR…. This last year has been a tough one for me as a creator. As a kid from the 90’s on the cusp of the technology boom and always loving a more analog life, I came into this world not wanting to become and influencer. Being

item.title: NEW SERIES!! - BUMP TO PLATE 👶 You might’ve seen… me and Molly are having a baby 🤍 And every week, the baby grows it gets compared to a fruit or veg. So I’m turning that into a recipe series. Week 17: a pomegranate. At this stage, baby’s: • developing s
item.description: NEW SERIES!! - BUMP TO PLATE 👶 You might’ve seen… me and Molly are having a baby 🤍 And every week, the baby grows it gets compared to a fruit or veg. So I’m turning that into a recipe series. Week 17: a pomegranate. At this stage, baby’s: • developing s

item.title: I JUST BLOODY LOVE MAKING FOOD 🍲 If you love food as much as much. Be sure to check out my website www.nomeatdisco.com for all my recipes. Oh and my substack for cooking tips, music playlists and a bit more about my life. Oh and to top it all off, I hav
item.description: I JUST BLOODY LOVE MAKING FOOD 🍲 If you love food as much as much. Be sure to check out my website www.nomeatdisco.com for all my recipes. Oh and my substack for cooking tips, music playlists and a bit more about my life. Oh and to top it all off, I hav

item.title: SMASH BURGER TACOS 🌮 Oh Lordy lord these were good! Do you reckon you’d give these a go? Ingredients 1 @beyondmeat patty 1 cheese square (@cathedral_city_uk always) 2 tbsp mayo 1 tbsp ketchup 1 tbsp mustard 1 tbsp pickle brine 1 tsp paprika Half white
item.description: SMASH BURGER TACOS 🌮 Oh Lordy lord these were good! Do you reckon you’d give these a go? Ingredients 1 @beyondmeat patty 1 cheese square (@cathedral_city_uk always) 2 tbsp mayo 1 tbsp ketchup 1 tbsp mustard 1 tbsp pickle brine 1 tsp paprika Half white

item.title: MAPO TOFU 🍜 Okay I’ve been making dishes like this for years with silken tofu as a sauce base. Now it’s gone viral, I thought well I make this anyway so why not make it again! It’s unreal! For all you protein heads, this has loads of protein! Ingredien
item.description: MAPO TOFU 🍜 Okay I’ve been making dishes like this for years with silken tofu as a sauce base. Now it’s gone viral, I thought well I make this anyway so why not make it again! It’s unreal! For all you protein heads, this has loads of protein! Ingredien

item.title: BANANA SNICKERS TOAST 🍌 Don’t you just love those breakfast in bed kind of mornings! Molly certainly does at the moment! Ingredients 1 banana 1 tbsp brown sugar 1 tsp cinnamon 1 tbsp cream cheese (@philadelphia_uki ) 1 tbsp tahini 1 tsp chia seeds 6/7
item.description: BANANA SNICKERS TOAST 🍌 Don’t you just love those breakfast in bed kind of mornings! Molly certainly does at the moment! Ingredients 1 banana 1 tbsp brown sugar 1 tsp cinnamon 1 tbsp cream cheese (@philadelphia_uki ) 1 tbsp tahini 1 tsp chia seeds 6/7

item.title: BUMP TO PLATE EP. 2 - FATTEH 🥣 FIND THIS RECIPE ON MY SUBSTACK, link in bio x This series is based around simple meals that are good for you. Every week, the recipe will be based around what nutrients a baby and mother need throughout pregnancy and when

item.title: STICKY COFFEEMASU HOT CROSS BUN BREAD N BUTTER PUDDING 🍮 Well isn’t that a tongue twister. Combining four desserts into one dish the Easter! Oh and I hope you have a wonderful Easter weekend break x Ingredients 7 hot cross buns For the bread and butter

item.title: BUTTER CURRY WITH A STICY GLAZED MUSHROOM 🍄‍🟫 Oh my days was this amazing! Mushrooms are so good you can do so much with them! Ingredients Butter curry: 2 tbsp butter 1 tbsp curry powder 1 red onion chopped 2 cloves garlic 1 thumb piece ginger 2 tbsp
item.description: BUTTER CURRY WITH A STICY GLAZED MUSHROOM 🍄‍🟫 Oh my days was this amazing! Mushrooms are so good you can do so much with them! Ingredients Butter curry: 2 tbsp butter 1 tbsp curry powder 1 red onion chopped 2 cloves garlic 1 thumb piece ginger 2 tbsp

item.title: MUSHROOM SATAY SKEWERS 🍗 This is one of my fav recipes ever! It’s perfect for bbq season too, which is slowly approaching! Ingredients 1 punnet (300g) of oyster mushrooms For the mushroom marinade: 2 tbsp cooking oil 1 tbsp Thai red curry paste 2 tbs
item.description: MUSHROOM SATAY SKEWERS 🍗 This is one of my fav recipes ever! It’s perfect for bbq season too, which is slowly approaching! Ingredients 1 punnet (300g) of oyster mushrooms For the mushroom marinade: 2 tbsp cooking oil 1 tbsp Thai red curry paste 2 tbs

item.title: GOCHUJANG BRAISED JERSEY ROYALS 🥔 I got invited to the island of Jersey by @jerseyroyals for a trip to see how these amazing potatoes have been grown for generations. I adopted a row of potatoes that were planted a month ago, when I got there they were

item.title: WEEK 1 - 6 WEEK TRAINING BLOCK FOR A 10km 🏃‍♂️ So I’ve decided to run a 10km race, it’s the @great_run and I’ve been invited to do it by @luckysaintbeer I’m actually feeling very motivated to go again, after telling myself I wouldn’t race this year with

item.title: BUMP TO PLATE - WEEK 20 - GRAPEFRUIT SALAD 🥗 We’re officially halfway in our pregnancy journey and this week we found out we’re having a LITTLE BABY GIRL! We’re so so happy! I’ve written a full substack post giving you guys all the nutrients mothers nee

item.title: KUNG PAO TOFU 🍜 This is something I have for an easy dinner all of the time. Serve it with rice or noodles and you’re on to a winner! Ingredients 1 block of firm tofu (I used @tofoo ) 2 tbs corn starch 1 tsp MSG 2 tsp cracked pepper The veg: 1/2 gree
item.description: KUNG PAO TOFU 🍜 This is something I have for an easy dinner all of the time. Serve it with rice or noodles and you’re on to a winner! Ingredients 1 block of firm tofu (I used @tofoo ) 2 tbs corn starch 1 tsp MSG 2 tsp cracked pepper The veg: 1/2 gree

item.title: LONDON MARATHON TOP TIPS 🏃‍♂️ A few simple tips for race day at @londonmarathon tomorrow! Number 1 - make sure you fuel right. Fuel is key, I’ve done races where I haven’t fuelled hardly at all and feel horrible and like I cannot run another step. Where
item.description: LONDON MARATHON TOP TIPS 🏃‍♂️ A few simple tips for race day at @londonmarathon tomorrow! Number 1 - make sure you fuel right. Fuel is key, I’ve done races where I haven’t fuelled hardly at all and feel horrible and like I cannot run another step. Where

item.title: BUMP TO PLATE WEEK 22 - BANANA MISO DARK CHOCOLATE MOUSSE 🍫 This week our baby is the size of a banana. So I incorporated it into this recipe! I also talk a bit about what vaccines we have decided to go with for our baby. So if you want to read more. S

item.title: NEW SERIES - BETTER LUNCHES 🍱 Welcome to my new series. Haven’t done a food related series in a while and I’m super excited about this one! If you struggle with lunches every day and end up having the same boring ones, this series is there to help you b

item.title: EP. 1: BETTER LUNCHES - CHICKEN, BACON & SWEETCORN WRAP 🌯 Welcome to the first episode of Better lunches where I make lunches that are more exciting than the usual suspects. Today Molly wanted a ceaser wrap. So I based the principle off that, but made so

item.title: EP. 2: BETTER LUNCHES - EGGPLANT SCHNITZEL with a green goddess sauce and tomato salad 🥗 What’s your favourite way to have a schnitzel? Ingredients For the eggplant schnitzel: 1 medium eggplant 1 cup plain flour 1 coup water 2 cups panko breadcrumbs

item.title: EP. 3- BETTER LUNCHES - SHEET PAN TOFU KEBAB 🫓 This one is probably going to hit some nerves and be a bit controversial, but having been vegan for 9 years this is where I currently stand. Ingredients For the kebab: 1 block firm tofu 2 tbsp aquafaba 1
item.description: EP. 3- BETTER LUNCHES - SHEET PAN TOFU KEBAB 🫓 This one is probably going to hit some nerves and be a bit controversial, but having been vegan for 9 years this is where I currently stand. Ingredients For the kebab: 1 block firm tofu 2 tbsp aquafaba 1

item.title: LOADED CRISPS 002 - BUFFALO TOFU SALT AND VINEGAR 🍗 Today we ventured out to the River Stour to load some crisps. A beautiful spring evening with my family. Crisps - salt and vinegar @tyrrellsofficial Tofu - @tofoo Buffalo sauce - @brewdogofficial Top

item.title: MY DEBUT COOKBOOK IS AVAILABLE TO PRE-ORDER NOW!!! NO MEAT DISCO - A Seven Ingredient Cookbook SEPTEMBER 2026. Pre order now x The link is in my bio x Love you all and I owe this one to all of you, I can’t wait for you guys to get your hands on it. 🧡 @Li
